titleStmt.title: SII 6.955: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 955. (A.R. No. 309-E of 1899). IN THE SAME NICHE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śinaśeṭlakulōdbhūtō vaiśyapravarasattamaḥ . śrīmānamarasannāmā paḍirāyapadōnnataḥ . 1 nṛsiṁhaca
raṇadvaṁdvasmṛtivravilasammanāḥ svāyurārōgyatanayakhyātivaṁśābhivṛddhayē . 2 mahīdṛgṛṣicaṁdrēṇa gaṇitē śakavatsarē . nabhaḥ
kṛṣṇāṣṭamīyuktarōhiṇībhṛguvāsarē . 3 prītyai naraharēragrē dharmmānētānacīklṛ vat . saṁdhyāvadhi tu madhyāhnāt prāgdhū
pāvadhīśituḥ . 4 gītāni vīṇayā gātunnityaṁgāyakayōrdvayōḥ . gāyaṁtīnāṁ catusrāṇāmupagāyakayōrapi . 5
dvayōstriyōḥ harēragrē vījayaṁtyōśca cāmarē . kālōcitāḥ puṣpamālāssamarppayituranvahaṁ . 6 Ētadhdharmmānusaṁdhātrī
puruṣassa ca nityaśaḥ . dadau vṛttiṁ tu sarvvēṣānnibaṁdhānāṁ caturddaśa . pravarttatāmayaṁ dharmmō yāvadācaṁdratārakaṁ . 7
śakavarṣaṁbulu 1271 gunēṇṭi śrāvaṇa kṛṣṇāṣṭamiyu bhṛguvāramunāḍu poṭṭanūri vaiśyakulōttamuḍaina Ama
rapaḍirāyuḍu tanaku nāyurārōgyaiśvaryābhivṛdhdhigānu śrīnarasiṁhasannidini Ubhayasaṁdhyalayaṁdu nityamu
nnu vīṇāgānamucēśeḍi gāyakulu Iddaṟu Ottukāṁṟu Iddarakuṁgā peṭṭina nibaṁdālu 4 Ī pāḍeḍi strīlu naluvuraku
nibaṁdhālu 4 Ī samayāna tana samarppiṁcina cāmaralu paṇimāreḍi strīlu naluvuraku nibaṁdhālu 4 bhaIvārigaṁgiśeṭṭi cēta
nu vilicina gaṭṭa tirumāla samarppiṁceḍi sāniki nibaṁdha 1 Anusaṁdhātasōmādula ciṁgunāyakuni nibaṁdha 1 mukhari
narasi vīṭi 1 naṭṭavacinnama 1 cītamārapiraḍi 1 lōkayasīta 1 jannunarasiṁhama 1 mukhari cittana 1
mārekūtama 1
paṁḍitāya nṛharērddharmma vaiṣṇavān yācatēmarapaḍirāyō dharmmassaṁrakṣyatāmiti . śatru
ṇāpi kṛtō dharmmaḥ pālanīyō manīṣibhiḥ śatrurēva hi śatrussyāddharmmaśśatṛrnna kasyacit . Ī dharmmu śrīvai
ṣṇavula rakṣa Amarapaḍirāyuḍu peṭina brasāda ku 14 [.] Ī ku 14 māsa cinnalekkanu 7 gānu vīriki jītānaku
pālikiccina mā 14 ga māḍalu 140 Ī paiṁḍi Evvaru voṁdinānu Anaṁttaṭāvupeṭi kuḍuvaṁga
lāru śrīnarasiṁhuni pāda śaraṇu .
Digital edition of SII 6.955 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
